positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a crescent moon and scattered constellations, rendered in a clean, thick-line art style. The composition features the celestial bodies arranged in a strong central vertical pillar, with sharp, angular geometric forms replacing traditional curves. Use a two-color limited palette of deep indigo blue and matte gold accent. Focus on stark contrast and negative space. The design must be suitable for printing on fabric, featuring clean, solid silhouettes with crisp edges, perfect for a central chest placement. High detail, vector art quality, retro sci-fi aesthetic.
